name: The Blue Whale
description: “The Blue Whale is the largest creature ever.” — @elonmusk 🐋 $BlueWhale is built on Gud Whale Tek — a transaction-based buyback system designed to reward SOL holders who truly HODL 💎🙌 We’re proud to announce that our CTO is now live. This is a community-owned movement, powered by the people and built around the $BlueWhale token. At our core, we represent unity, safety, and long-term thinking in crypto. But our mission goes beyond the blockchain. The Blue Whale bridges the gap between memes and real-world impact by supporting actual whale conservation 💙🐋
